Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CROWELL & MORING LLP's Motion To File Under Seal Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint And Exhibit.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Crowell & Moring's unopposed motion "to file under seal portions of plaintiff's complaint and exhibit" is granted.

The Court will sign the submitted proposed order which properly recites CRC 2.550(d).
